title: pelargonium × theresae
intro: Pelargonium × theresae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium capitatum. Its leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as aid in digestion and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × theresae include essential oil, tea, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically for various health benefits.
